collections.name: comments
collections.description: Comments left on recipes or blog posts.

fields.name: recipeId
fields.description: The ID of the recipe this comment belongs to

fields.name: user
fields.description: The display name of the user

fields.name: userId
fields.description: The auth uid of the user if logged in, or 'guest' if not

fields.name: avatar
fields.description: The avatar URL of the user

fields.name: date
fields.description: The formatted date string of the comment
